headline: Leandro Trossard
body: Leandro Trossard has now completed his move to Beşiktaş from Arsenal on a 3+1 contract.✍️ Ben Jacobs (JacobsBen) Beşiktaş and Arsenal both confirm an agreement for Leandro Trossard. As reported yesterday, Trossard has agreed to a 3+1 contract.Fee is €18m+€2m.🇧🇪 —
raw_text:
Leandro Trossard has now completed his move to Beşiktaş from Arsenal on a 3+1 contract.✍️




Ben Jacobs (@JacobsBen)

Beşiktaş and Arsenal both confirm an agreement for Leandro Trossard. As reported yesterday, Trossard has agreed to a 3+1 contract.Fee is €18m+€2m.🇧🇪







— https://nitter.net/JacobsBen/status/2077017579692929144#m
